subjects.description: floating medieval castle transforming into a cyberpunk cityscape
subjects.appearance_details: ancient stone towers, carved battlements, arched windows, heavy walls, then glowing neon seams, glass towers, holographic panels, and vertical skyscraper forms
subjects.relationship: central architectural subject that bridges ancient fantasy and futuristic urban design
subjects.location: center frame, suspended high above a futuristic metropolis before descending into it
subjects.relative_size: immense architectural mass, larger than vehicles and comparable to surrounding skyscrapers after transformation
subjects.orientation: descending vertically with towers upright, then stretching upward into city blocks and spires
subjects.pose: graceful airborne descent turning into vertical urban growth
subjects.action: floats down, unfurls stone walls, reshapes into neon skyscrapers, and settles into a dense cyberpunk skyline
subjects.state_changes: stone carvings glow with neon lines; castle walls elongate into skyscrapers; ancient towers become futuristic high rises
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: weathered stone, carved masonry, then reflective glass, chrome, neon, and rain-slick metal
subjects.facial_features: arched windows, battlements, glowing signs, and tower facades

subjects.description: flying cars and drones circling the emerging city
subjects.appearance_details: small airborne vehicles with luminous thrusters, blinking navigation lights, smooth metallic shells, and compact drone silhouettes
subjects.relationship: futuristic traffic emphasizing the new cyberpunk environment
subjects.location: midair lanes around the castle and between skyscrapers
subjects.relative_size: tiny compared with the castle and towers
subjects.orientation: arcing around the descending structure and weaving through vertical streets
subjects.pose: continuous flight paths with gentle banking turns
subjects.action: circle, pass, hover, and stream through neon corridors as the city forms
subjects.state_changes: traffic density increases; thruster trails brighten; drones reposition around new towers
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: glossy metal, dark glass, LED strips, and soft engine glow
subjects.facial_features: headlights, sensor lenses, and glowing thrusters

background_setting: A vertical cyberpunk skyline under a dark atmospheric sky, packed with neon signs, reflective skyscrapers, aerial lanes, drones, flying cars, glowing windows, and misty urban depth.

lighting.conditions: Vibrant magenta, cyan, electric blue, and amber neon glow against dim twilight haze, with reflective highlights sliding across stone, glass, and metallic surfaces.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Vibrant magenta, cyan, electric blue, and amber neon glow against dim twilight haze, with reflective highlights sliding across stone, glass, and metallic surfaces.

aesthetics.composition: Fantasy architecture merging with cyberpunk futurism, dramatic scale, luminous transformation, rich neon color, airborne traffic, and dense urban spectacle.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Fantasy architecture merging with cyberpunk futurism, dramatic scale, luminous transformation, rich neon color, airborne traffic, and dense urban spectacle.

cinematography.camera_motion: Grand wide shot with slow downward camera drift, then a sweeping orbital move around the transforming castle as towers grow into the skyline.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: High detail cinematic fantasy cyberpunk text-to-video.
artistic_style: Epic speculative city transformation with photoreal materials, stylized neon atmosphere, and smooth magical technology morphing.
context: An ancient floating castle descends into a futuristic city and transforms into the core of a towering cyberpunk metropolis filled with drones and flying cars.

actions.description: The medieval castle floats gracefully through the air, its stone carvings and towers visible against a neon skyline below.
As it descends, stone walls stretch upward, windows ignite with neon, and cyberpunk skyscrapers rise around the castle form.
Flying cars and drones weave through the completed cityscape while neon signs flicker across the transformed towers.

segments.description: Show the ornate medieval castle suspended above a futuristic city, descending slowly through mist and neon glow.
segments.key_changes: The castle lowers and the first neon seams appear in the stone.
segments.camera: Wide cinematic aerial view with slow downward drift.

segments.description: The castle transforms into a rising cyberpunk city core, mixing battlements, glass, steel, holographic light, and skyscraper silhouettes.
segments.key_changes: Stone becomes glass and chrome, towers extend, signs flicker on, and air traffic increases.
segments.camera: Smooth orbital sweep around the central structure with vertical parallax.

segments.description: Reveal the finished cyberpunk skyline alive with flying cars, drones, neon reflections, and futuristic activity.
segments.key_changes: Transformation completes and the city becomes busy and luminous.
segments.camera: Pull back to a majestic long shot of the completed cityscape.

temporal_caption: A floating medieval castle descends and transforms into a neon cyberpunk city filled with skyscrapers, flying cars, and drones.
audio_description: Low magical stone resonance, rising electronic hum, neon buzz, distant engines, drone whirs, and layered futuristic city ambience.
